attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCP_RM_PRJ_ASMT)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.ASSIGNMENT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.CITIZENSHIP_REQUIREMENTS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.CITIZENSHIP_REQ_COUNTRY_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.SECURITY_CLEARANCE_REQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.SECURITY_CLEARANCE_DETAIL, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.ON_SITE_PERCENT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.TRAVEL_REQ, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.TRAVEL_REQ_DETAIL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TRAVEL_REQ_DETAIL, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.TRAVEL_BUDGET_EXIST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.EMAIL_PRIMARY_NCE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.TIMEZONE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.REVENUE_AT_RISK, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.FILE_LINK, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.WORK_TYPE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.ACTIVITY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.CUSTOMER_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.RES_REQD_ONSITE_3MONTHS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT,
(
select ASSIGNMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT
minus
select ASSIGNMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ASSIGNMENT_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.ASSIGNMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_DCPRM_PRJASMT.REFRESH_DATETIME
